name: Idea Review
description: Workflow nhe de danh gia idea truoc spec: co dang lam khong, scope nao hop ly, nen build hay reuse, va next step la gi.

steps.title: Normalize idea
steps.hint: Restate raw idea, interpreted goal, va assumptions; chi hoi neu thieu context blocker

steps.title: Value check
steps.hint: Danh gia user, pain, urgency, value, workaround; verdict weak/moderate/strong

steps.title: Fit and feasibility
steps.hint: Check product fit, technical fit, complexity, va risk o muc nhe

steps.title: Build vs reuse
steps.hint: Check existing codebase, simpler alternative, open-source, SaaS, roi moi custom build

steps.title: Scope recommendation
steps.hint: De xuat Small/Medium/Large va chon smallest useful scope

steps.title: Decision
steps.hint: Ket luan: do-now / defer / reject / reuse-or-integrate / research-more; neu do-now thi next la /create-spec
steps.human_gate_reason: Idea review la business/product decision. Human can accept verdict va next action truoc khi vao /create-spec hoac dung lai.

steps.title: Create spec
steps.hint: Chi chay neu decision la do-now hoac reuse-or-integrate da duoc human approve
steps.human_gate_reason: Chi tao spec sau khi human chap nhan idea review verdict va recommended scope.
